name: Walter Isaacson
abstract: Walter Seff Isaacson (born May 20, 1952) is an American journalist who has written biographies of Henry Kissinger, Benjamin Franklin, Leonardo da Vinci, Albert Einstein, Steve Jobs, Jennifer Doudna, and Elon Musk. As of 2024, Isaacson is a professor at Tulane University and, since 2018, an interviewer for the PBS and CNN news show Amanpo…

concerts.label: HISTORYTalks™
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Lorraine Feather
about_quotes.evidence: I was reading this book by Walter Isaacson, a terrific writer, Einstein: His Life and Universe.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lorraine Feather interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 22, 2023
